final_prompt.prompt:
Create a tactical gear showcase illustration with military firearms, body armor, and night-vision equipment arranged in an orderly display.

Style/medium: hardcore military tactical illustration, technical equipment catalog aesthetic, photorealistic product rendering
Composition: top-down flat lay arrangement, symmetrical grid layout, items evenly spaced with military precision
Subject: assorted firearms (rifles, pistols), tactical ballistic vest with MOLLE webbing, night-vision goggles, magazines and accessories
Scene/backdrop: dark matte surface, deep charcoal or near-black background, minimal environmental context
Lighting/mood: cold directional lighting from upper left, hard shadows, clinical and authoritative atmosphere
Color palette: desaturated military greens, matte black, gunmetal gray, subtle coyote tan accents
Materials/textures: carbon fiber weave, Cordura nylon, matte polymer, cold steel, rubberized grips
Avoid: warm tones, soft diffused light, cluttered chaos, cartoonish rendering, 8K stuffer aesthetic
